category_sources: source_facts.description says Icecast is a streaming MP3 audio server; official icecast.org describes it as streaming multimedia server software.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name identifies the project as icecast; source_facts.homepage is the official Icecast site.
docs_sources: Official icecast.org docs page says the latest official Icecast documentation is available there.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official icecast.org download page names the public development repository as gitlab.xiph.org/xiph/icecast-server.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an audio streaming server; official Icecast/Xiph sources describe Icecast as multimedia streaming server software.
